qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Denial of service via unbounded Twig template evaluation in Formulas service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause and vulnerable component: this finding concerns authenticated access to Formulas::evaluateFormula() and Twig resource exhaustion, while the advisory concerns stored XSS in inventory rendering of product and variant fields.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause: stored XSS caused by unescaped Craft Commerce inventory-page rendering of Product Title, Variant Title, or Variant SKU fields, with cookie exposure through the PHP Info utility.
evidence: The advisory describes CWE-79 stored XSS in /admin/commerce/inventory from unescaped product and variant fields.
The qualifying finding twig_formula_dos describes Twig formula resource exhaustion in the Formulas service, not stored XSS in product or variant inventory fields.
